subject: The New York Times just endorsed us

body:
I have incredible news. Our campaign was just endorsed by The New York Times! | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z1VC_axfGfP-Ol2v7vAAC9CuAHXEgiwYj8Hbvi91Jk9p9eSVvhgLk-kwIFqJ5lv65YruoDh5f14We336-ncyWP3t7xBTtEyKGZM7Ii3wgqnOddwu50U4n7fpiGPUL6DBLUaINR19n8eXvW13pN21thujPjQhh9ZVoVEQrY7F3y2LKN-ACEF14sSll_rbuYy7TJtNqk30jb6e46CVQJxHtKfxDuNkkC_ToTaPqgjR_LFpzRW-nHoAmqwu_WCHCOz7bx0OGf1mRf0SAfRoWwjFX7fKkW5QFseud8Qa6c1B8j6Zl7sKrYVKmV7o-2BZh0gHM/32l/BydnK1QqTASPl-4mlogRjQ/h0/cd5TjW-0E2MIhyeLxpzbrWWU0yrBhzMSb3jUGqxyvx0) Friend, **** **** **** I have incredible news. Our campaign was just endorsed by The New York Times!
In its endorsement, the editorial board wrote:
_[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z1VC_axfGfP-Ol2v7vAAC9JSfmkL6RPdlqXfG_MT3oCUcu7Mmg98cmh6cEVlYWB_XMEiWXMti15GLK2tOmo72VWc8DF1eRqq4EpGKTWUtoJ01FAdFs-Nfv7B-mRARmSoUcUFhGyQfVD_ZL8EAASJs17RdThdolMM0Hm9BPypJAjBHn53nFaIzYaC0aCn-MyyAgmN2aXTSk1SQdd9O07VNiTjvM3jR8UllmexyO3zdymgSS7ySKfscwReJ8VfzpF6T1F1tQXyjUeTUJHJFeQrDzyvr-bEZ__BvAXhlOybkmo31HW61BYRpWW7foKVI7ysE/32l/BydnK1QqTASPl-4mlogRjQ/h1/8F7IcIpXUe4MnCC_3TdBUPpK3lA8QcZcwccFyFN01T4)_
11 months ago, I was sitting at my kitchen table, calling friends and family to tell them I was running for Congress. Since then, we have built a movement of thousands of people and been endorsed by Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, and now The New York Times. It has been breathtaking to watch this movement grow.
**_[We have all of the momentum that exists in this race, and now it’s time to finish strong. Will you make a donation today to help us win?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z1VC_axfGfP-Ol2v7vAAC9_b3LgHR3slpNCaD4TY0IxjazvdjvAAcFOkMXTF9EitbEJvlYMokXPPsCB-3W41LvZy_L-cqvous4SaiXKep7sI4JXdmEKSF6XsRJpZAlk1SlI-qWHEgY-DOJpdTTMzGLk3jnk1QvMYphd8S7GiJVx_225325wYIJdL9fcuNTJatIkLB6WWPpiYIJWBPfzTs7114chAzKgw8a4D2DuGzJ8yfhu2d1xZzrxfQoeEypxJVsjnGwaLWg4CRtAxmFWxQ1ALHqHa224XRvIbnNVTXy89hs1YZ0x5hgR8Irv6uiyb4/32l/BydnK1QqTASPl-4mlogRjQ/h2/qQkPQJWgXTFv3DfO4PGC29PWjX-PhsMawr-FqydjkNg)_**
Today is one of those days when not having my grandfather is especially hard. ‬He grew up in Jim Crow Virginia. As he walked a dirt road to school, white children spat on him from the school bus as it rode past. ‬
‪If he were here, I imagine we’d be sitting at the kitchen table reading The New York Times editorial board’s endorsement of his grandson, tearful with joy at how far we had come.
I’m grateful to the editorial board for its powerful endorsement of our campaign. We are going to win this election. **_[Will you join us?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z1VC_axfGfP-Ol2v7vAAC9vFkb0YRQKqM4flzbIUxosdSjt9rwIDy_v__WUWv1pkQg06vrDudwimKTdXSm4_SAtNQo0kVqou9tS7ZgRP98nHysN5I0wbLpdzAOKEOwuHSDQ1_WbITa9xKBfCCFtSrljdzRjgsYzoHxexVeJDSNDR63CQCSaPFcRm7tVcI9yWsjXlxIMPs4-lyNNj2TE_qWBNi4n0Y9IeIuLvCYqCbOpnBDWvbFeK5xTu0bJLTh2q5AbtKMsp3gYg3cr4ypscWQMEzRqxxStlhi0K4w0047QZVqvWXt14UyoF90UMv21oI/32l/BydnK1QqTASPl-4mlogRjQ/h3/bNN3NqEewF-bq4lCjkOAmVbag7PIUaTYKmaTT2ZlZDE)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953z1VC_axfGfP-Ol2v7vAAC9YTK5yYc552Th1t7tSHrOHJASfQ3m8irex9xM59aGNLWXQK7Qkv7Uz1w1M18klQ0RbiivhD1XP9KYabt0OsopoaU9yFPPQaEVZlv939DIbgX8EYcLnqt7orlWgynXlEPDxghf4AsHycMvNQ-o3yFxrMECDrW9B8ol7posZqaBmFoCK0XQq3m62t9Avj9bXDHcQYIH91db10cV0awgB5IPYj1hrba6TfVtENNw-MxX-3es1I-z0zDJSeUE7nrjT2ehkParxDFfF3l40Kj2_fK4zjtqs5L_fb82o39hTD5GTSA/32l/BydnK1QqTASPl-4mlogRjQ/h4/p39qvABo_LDBMOaWSyAy1XOlRnJ8YqCUdcBuplNtB6I)

body:

name: Catherine Engelbrecht
subject: $4 billion??
body:
We know what Nancy Pelosi and her cronies want. We MUST stand united to stop them! READ MORE >>
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=50A82A14A397)

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=50A82A14A406)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend,

There’s zero doubt about the leftist Democrats’ ultimate goal in this year’s elections.

They want to seize greater power, at any cost... and the future of free and fair American elections hangs in the balance.

Have you heard of the Take Responsibility for Workers and Families Act?

It’s more widely known as the far-left “wish list” bill Nancy Pelosi and her cronies were pushing back in March, as they held up the CARES Act and emergency relief for hard-hit families and businesses.

This bill included $4 BILLION to force their nationwide vote-by-mail scheme on the states.

THIS is how they want to expand the chaos we’re seeing now. It would throw open the door to fraud, manipulation, and disenfranchisement on a scale never seen in our country.

Thankfully, the President and Senate Republicans stopped this bill. But that doesn’t mean the Democrats are giving up on it.

They’re STILL looking for ways to make this dangerous scheme a reality.

From Pelosi’s very first bill this session -- the outrageous HB1: For the People Act of 2019, to this latest insanity ... and all the election bills in between... for the Democrats, everything is about November’s election. Everything.

[Help us stop them in their tracks, and once and for all. The integrity of our elections is under attack like never before](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=50A82A14A406)[.](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=50A82A14A406)

---
| | [ Contribute to Fund our Fight >> ](https://truethevote.acemlnc.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=50A82A14A406)
---
| | Onward!

Catherine Engelbrecht
True the Vote

name: House DFL Team
subject: How you can help
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/mryiU97r_DxE5icIXpvG7S_KXtTA2jOoa8zAqBSfTZs=/4-HD3gFGSqUAsn9lxoTeNkUWOdT5Uqljcjh3pKBiIzg=?refcode=061320)
| | Friend, This week, the Minnesota Legislature was called back for a special session. There is much for us to do:
* Aid for Minnesotans and businesses affected by COVID-19
* Unfinished business from the regular legislative session including our jobs & local projects bill
* Police accountability and public safety reforms to address structural racism in response to the murder of George Floyd
* Assistance for Minneapolis and Saint Paul's recovery from the recent civil unrest

While this important, crucial work is being done at the Capitol, we must also keep one eye on the future. Our work on the campaign won't stop. The November 3rd election is still quickly approaching. **Will you help us today by making an investment in the House DFL Campaign?** Together, we can protect and expand our progressive DFL majority in the Minnesota House. _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ [**Refundable $50**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mryiU97r_DxE5icIXpvG7S_KXtTA2jOoa8zAqBSfTZs=/4-HD3gFGSqUAsn9lxoTeNkUWOdT5Uqljcjh3pKBiIzg=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=061320) [**Refundable $100**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mryiU97r_DxE5icIXpvG7S_KXtTA2jOoa8zAqBSfTZs=/4-HD3gFGSqUAsn9lxoTeNkUWOdT5Uqljcjh3pKBiIzg=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=061320) _You can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) and it will be refunded to you by the state through the Minnesota Political Contribution Refund Program._ With everything going on, it's safe to say that this election is the most consequential election in recent history. Reelecting our majority and flipping the Minnesota Senate will help to bring about the big changes that are needed to build a better future for all Minnesotans. Thank you for your support, House DFL Team [P.S. Each year you can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) to a campaign and it will be refunded to you by the state. Act Now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/mryiU97r_DxE5icIXpvG7S_KXtTA2jOoa8zAqBSfTZs=/4-HD3gFGSqUAsn9lxoTeNkUWOdT5Uqljcjh3pKBiIzg=?refcode=061320) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/mryiU97r_DxE5icIXpvG7S_KXtTA2jOoa8zAqBSfTZs=/4-HD3gFGSqUAsn9lxoTeNkUWOdT5Uqljcjh3pKBiIzg=?refcode=061320)

body:
We need to take action now to help Mondaire Jones ramp up his organizing and outreach efforts.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17853640/208736194/-1445340428?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWZhYWNhYS03ZWFkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSF4xfKvJDOzEDtJn7lBudXVwQcX1smTuWrcUhuMsrw=&emci=924dadb2-c2ac-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=fefaacaa-7ead-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=1262380)
People first candidates need your help, team.
Right now, **Mondaire Jones** is running for Congress in New York's 17th district. It's an open seat, which means we have a great opportunity to send a people first candidate to Congress.
But Mondaire's primary is **less than two weeks away** , which means we need to take action now to help him ramp up his organizing and outreach efforts. **[Can you do your part by chipping in today? 100% of your gift will go directly to Mondaire's campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17853653/208736207/622717339?refcode=em20200613-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWZhYWNhYS03ZWFkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSF4xfKvJDOzEDtJn7lBudXVwQcX1smTuWrcUhuMsrw=)**
[Contribute →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17853654/208736208/622717339?refcode=em20200613&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWZhYWNhYS03ZWFkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSF4xfKvJDOzEDtJn7lBudXVwQcX1smTuWrcUhuMsrw=)
Mondaire is a true example of a people first candidate. He grew up in New York's 17th, raised by a single mother, and got by with the help of section 8 housing and food stamps.
From there, Mondaire became a lawyer, a nonprofit leader, an activist, and a champion of children and working people.
Now, he's running for Congress so he can fight for families like the one he grew up in, and make sure that all children can dream big like he did.
**[But, first, he needs to win his primary on June 23 against a crowded field. You can help him by giving what you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17853655/208736209/622717339?refcode=em20200613-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTYvMS83MjQyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZWZhYWNhYS03ZWFkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xSF4xfKvJDOzEDtJn7lBudXVwQcX1smTuWrcUhuMsrw=) Remember, 100% of your gift will go directly to Mondaire Jones.**
Thank you for your help,
People First Future

name: Team Messner
subject: This Week: President Trump endorsement, Corky's USA plan, official filing, and more
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Entrepreneur. Veteran. Conservative. [Contact Us](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/511bafac896c4c60/b265cb012c21580ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) | |
---
**President Trump Endorses Corky Messner’s Run for the U.S. Senate**

[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/511bafac896c4c60/a5c628b1d3bf7323c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

President Donald Trump has endorsed Corky Messner’s run for the U.S. Senate.

“Corky Messner will be a fantastic Senator for New Hampshire,” **[says President Trump](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/511bafac896c4c60/cbdd42a3a8d2d102c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**. “A West Point graduate, he served our country in the Army with distinction. Strong on jobs, crime, veterans, and the Second Amendment. Corky has my complete and total endorsement!”
“I am humbled by the President’s support, and I will provide Granite Staters with the conservative voice they need in the U.S. Senate,” says Corky. “Career politician Jeanne Shaheen has lost touch with the everyday concerns and values of New Hampshire residents, and they can trust me to provide the leadership they need to face the challenges ahead.”
|
---
**Corky Messner Unveils Plan with a Goal of “Unleashing the Strength of America”**
This week, Corky unveiled a blueprint to restore America’s economic prosperity and manufacturing might, preserve individual liberties, and reduce government intrusion and over-regulation.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/511bafac896c4c60/92904a08bcb811efc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
The **Messner USA Plan: Unleashing the Strength of America** focuses on three main areas: economic freedom, national security, and individual liberty. **[You can read the plan on our website](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/511bafac896c4c60/c59cfaf3ec0d3c29c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

“We can unleash this nation’s strength, and restore our standing in the world, if we work toward providing economic opportunities and restoring personal liberties for every American,” says Corky, who adds that he stands ready to work with New Hampshire Governor Chris Sununu and President Trump “to reignite our American economy, by providing the leadership and the vision we need to move ahead.

“We can emerge from this pandemic, and from these times of social unrest and divisiveness, stronger as a people and as a country. What we need is a common mission and the common sense to restore the United States of America’s standing as a nation that is the envy of the world.”
|
---
**In the News**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/511bafac896c4c60/33025dec90b60477c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
We’re pleased to share Corky’s recent conversation with WKBK Open Mic host Dan Mitchell. Corky took questions from a few callers, and spoke about his newly-released USA Plan, the racial and social unrest nationwide, and how New Hampshire is slowly emerging from the pandemic. **[Click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/511bafac896c4c60/a01502a7ec5de0b5c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** to hear the interview.
|
---
**Super PAC Will Support Messner Campaign**
As **[WMUR reported](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/511bafac896c4c60/cdaaef5b3532842ec3d6b838967d376c/33153)** this week, the Freedom and Liberty PAC, led by a team of veteran GOP strategists, will work to “ensure Corky Messner wins the primary election in September and defeats Sen. Jeanne Shaheen in November,” according to a statement shared exclusively with WMUR’s New Hampshire Primary Source. The group says it has “already received pledges in the six-figures.”
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/511bafac896c4c60/7a36560bb79d0a72c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
|
---
**Yes, It's Official**
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/511bafac896c4c60/58d7f8940a92b66dc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

Corky filed his Declaration of Candidacy this week, meeting with New Hampshire Secretary of State Bill Gardner outside the State House in Concord. It was a Facebook Live event, but you can sneak a peek via our **[Facebook link](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/511bafac896c4c60/7435bc7e7b11a262c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**.

Per COVID-19 crowd guidelines, the event included supporters and staff, with Corky explaining his reasons for running, and his promise to Granite Staters to represent their values in the U.S. Senate.
|
---
**Upcoming Events – Check Our Website!**
We continue our Conversations 2.0 roundtables and other virtual events, so check our website regularly for information about the campaign and opportunities to ask Corky your questions and share your concerns.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/511bafac896c4c60/b5e418be5d6a9dd0c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

Small Business & Economic Recovery - Tuesday, June 23, at 6:30 p.m.
|

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: Energy and hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/LFgAPJH9DkQExp_MCZWfe5dgpT1j79BMOb3wM82CyGk=/sSibrTR2JMDvn9M1QjT7yvT91S31vKEkMe4hNVwDwWQ=?refcode=gf6.9.20)
---
| Dear Peter, Above all, **I am filled with energy and hope. ** **I was honored to join marches and rallies in Chesterfield, Powhatan, and Henrico and was inspired to see neighbors come together in Orange, Culpeper, and Nottoway Counties as well.** Neighbors of all ages, races, and backgrounds are coming together to affirm that Black Lives Matter and advocate for justice with a new sense of urgency and understanding -- I have never seen anything like it before. What I see across the VA-07 community is people **raising their voice in a shared determination for a better world.** They want the promise of racial equality to become the reality in their communities. They want a world where Black lives not only matter, but where Black lives are full of freedom, justice, and opportunity. They vow that we will never lose another neighbor like George Floyd again. I am inspired by all of those who have come together to march, pray, learn, sing, and show solidarity. I am proud that these are lessons I can show my children. **But most of all, in this moment I am full of energy and hope for long lasting change.** It will not be easy, but meaningful reform can, and must, be achieved -- as we're reminded this week during the 53rd anniversary of Loving vs. Virginia, the landmark Supreme Court case that legalized interracial marriage. Change isn't easy, but as my father told me when I decided to run for office the first time: **anything worth doing is hard work.** I am proud to do the hard work for you and with you during this historic time.
---
Thank you to all of you who have joined the call for justice,
_Abigail _

* * *
| | [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/LFgAPJH9DkQExp_MCZWfe5dgpT1j79BMOb3wM82CyGk=/sSibrTR2JMDvn9M1QjT7yvT91S31vKEkMe4hNVwDwWQ=?refcode=gf6.9.20)

---
| Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
---
Spanberger for Congress
PO Box 3121
3rd Floor
Glen Allen VA 23058 United States
Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/LFgAPJH9DkQExp_MCZWfe5dgpT1j79BMOb3wM82CyGk=/BxApbqh1XGgmgLKlROain-dh9libXLBCk9Io72idWjY=).

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: From Your Capitol – Lies, Back-Room Deals, and Deceit
body:
From Your Capitol – Lies, Back-Room Deals, and Deceit
---
| | |
---
| | [](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/pJTIzwCvelJ49yEajvOU-scUAIjgA2yqIaqKWtXTnfSI4ffG3JY4XESJAX1sUwEfUIbadmBuhSBYNiN0HRBzj9I98leRvoeDqoFBRnnMO_YbTyL5ex5jXtLutsfMD_Q1p14BJmgAH5UTpoMusFfux8UmNsLVf19cBcAx1HK5iID-40xPVQQhVbo4sdL1qmvq399e4rUwWOq7BVc6fbnQL-3Eza1wCHPDDf1a6A_6cORPJxMTRIpiLT1iGurZulDwxHE)
---
| | | |
---
**From Your Capitol – Lies, Back-Room Deals, and Deceit**
| |
---
| | | |
---
Folks have asked me from time to time to tell them what it is like to be a member of the Mississippi Legislature. Well, I have a story from this week at your capitol that really highlights just how dirty dealing and unethical some politicians really are. Most of you assume that you have elected principled men and women to represent you in the legislature and that they will work for issues that are important to you and your family. You assume that if the person has campaigned on a principle such as lower taxes they will always advocate for lower taxes. Nothing is further from the truth in most cases. Many who campaign on the conservative Republican platform and claim to adhere to its tenets make no effort to uphold those values and principles. They not only do not vote for these conservative principles they go so far as attempting to harm those who do uphold and vote for conservative principles. Most of you are unaware of the behind the scenes back room deals that take place in your capitol every day. An issue that came to the forefront this week is local taxes and the process that has developed to hide them from you. I have fought against these taxes since my first day in the legislature. Each year local governments take over $90 million out of our economy through these local taxes. That is money right out of your pocket. These taxes are clearly harmful to you the taxpayer and directly opposed to the basic Republican platform which states: _“Mississippi Republicans support the reduction of the tax burden on our citizens. We believe our tax burden is too high, our tax code is too complicated, and our tax system is inefficient. We believe in the reduction of taxes to empower taxpayers, to create a more competitive environment for job creation, to incentivize work, entrepreneurship, and investment, and to prevent the excessive growth of government”_ I have drawn criticism from local officials and other legislators by voting against these local taxes. They are upset because my vote to uphold the Republican principle of lower taxes serves to highlight their vote for the taxes and against the principles they were elected to uphold. **This week it all came to a head** In an attempt to compromise me and make it look like I support these tax increases Senator Blackwell of Olive Branch attached my name to a tax increase for the city of Olive Branch. He amended the bill naming it the “DANA CRISWELL MUNICIPALITY TOURISM TAX ACT”.
| | |
---
| |
---
| | I have never supported these taxes and do not support this tax on the citizens of Olive Branch. I do not believe you can claim to support the Republican platform of lower taxes and support these local tax increases. The American Conservative Union, the oldest conservative lobbying group in the country, gave Senator Blackwell a score of just 57% for his voting record.
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | During the same year I received the American Conservative Union’s Award for Conservative Excellence with a score of 95%. I have also been asked by President Trump to serve on his government deregulation task force.
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | **So who is the real conservative?** Is the real conservative the politician who tries to silence and compromise someone who upholds the conservative values you believe in, or is the real conservative the one who stands up and fights for your principles and values? You decide. I will continue to stand against the liberal agenda of increased taxes and back-room deals that compromise your principles and values, no matter the insults or pressure I receive from other politicians. UPDATE: Desoto county Senators David Parker and Mike Mclendon have removed their names from the bill to show they do not support Senator Blackwell’s dirty tactics. Also, the Mayor of Olive Branch has has informed me that he intends to rescind the request for the tax.
---
| |
---
| | | Friends for Dana Criswell
PO Box 1321 Olive Branch, MS 38654
Dana@DanaCriswell.net
---
| | | [](https://4gzmh.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/0jh-JBCyWJY7j8SPtehJZLk0vdK0XoQw9yqggk5p70ifW25s3C98PFmc6kAYYz9zW69c-PM2LwZCvohx3FS-nmn6lmZ9EoYFhDcb-nG8Vwe9_ViClx3ObHMkXq87OQlZycFvy23sZCQu9P-J7wbl0sa1mRlN7DcbYhy-Dkqaim7NhXb8C-E-E1X6cV8ceFrwqMG_3EAZ)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Reynolds=20|=20US=20Senate?=
subject: The end of the campaign
body:
Thank you for your support | | |
---
| | It's been an incredible journey
**WE ARE SO GLAD YOU WERE A PART OF IT**
* * *
* * *
* * *

---
| |
---
After working on this campaign for close to two years,

Election Day

finally

arrived!
---
|
---
On Tuesday evening, June 9, Denise and I were at the Daniel Island School polling station. There had been a steady stream of voters and I was still canvassing those arriving, still getting people interested in our message, even changing a few minds before they entered the building.
---
| At 7pm a woman came out and announced,
'No more voters', and then closed the door and locked it. I stood there for a second or two, thinking about that. I must admit I had an emotional moment. It was over.
---
|
---
| **_IT'S BEEN HARD WORK BUT IT WAS GREAT FUN TOO!_**
---
| The best part of this campaign was talking to people just like you. I didn't know how gratifying that could be. I was not a natural speaker, but I am convinced that talking to over 11,000 people can really make a difference with your speaking skills!
---
| When Covid hit and we couldn't talk to people face to face anymore we turned to the Dump Lindsey dump truck, driving through Charleston and spreading the word with a bullhorn to keep our social distance from people on their porches and out for a walk. People loved the dump truck and it quickly became a talking point around town.
---
| | We didn't achieve our goal, but there is an election in November, and I urge all of you to find out more about the candidates. They are there to answer your questions and if they are any good, they will welcome them.

I wish all of you the best. Denise and I were humbled by your kindness and support. Please keep following the campaigns and tell everyone you know to vote on November 3.
Thanks!
---
|
---
| |
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0541bb262869/the-end-of-the-campaign?e=6e84008331)
---

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: Will you defend or defund?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
Radical Democrats and the mainstream media will stop at NOTHING as they attempt to convince Americans that our police officers are villains [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7d0a3c85512a4ad9b7870719d374f682&_e=8D1A6KjALyYcNcxV3eushTN0Wx8BRt5NnyM9AaAXkhXBtX594lDuMXy9e4P3Pp3uFoVjEAcC-ZL08buErO8uzooAb7SLyYybK2aCAjtW04Xr0Tnj0ttKHM42CH_ufuW-dUDtSF47hvNTOCwnpVOlG1em2X-HGUGAKe_7P9DU4DZ860-9zwbgp-qIgpwoSOlGrqzxoQMNmWWdkygP6p-6K3xS1Ai9Ej5GbXlQLtA51X6Gf8mv3ZwaSyHNE7NrG3H4Zjz3N56HnVc_TDXjauk97TpFApL7C3QrgcxbERSYI1dKWKIRjccMTmmKphLb2yiBtDQhBK2sXicFyxDyE_ov2WioD8Ny-_awJA8hZ0faPmJds0TC1koMuP8O4wOHwqkENjvirGae5qCH-f6DTi33LbRngzcy4zzrtfohHL8UwR6CnO1r8xEt32rIicT2FuR5BKauIYSf44duShodg85vo7eYJXhjal1aynNFVnaQtpo%3D) [**TAKE OUR SURVEY NOW >>>**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7d0a3c85512a4ad9b7870719d374f682&_e=8D1A6KjALyYcNcxV3eushTN0Wx8BRt5NnyM9AaAXkhXBtX594lDuMXy9e4P3Pp3uFoVjEAcC-ZL08buErO8uzooAb7SLyYybK2aCAjtW04Xr0Tnj0ttKHM42CH_ufuW-dUDtSF47hvNTOCwnpVOlG1em2X-HGUGAKe_7P9DU4DZ860-9zwbgp-qIgpwoSOlGrqzxoQMNmWWdkygP6p-6K3xS1Ai9Ej5GbXlQLtA51X6Gf8mv3ZwaSyHNE7NrG3H4Zjz3N56HnVc_TDXjauk97bm97onVidrlN5U-p7s8S-NEaTxsHVAXdtwGTTAETrVfFjwNz-XIeod4Hj9YdCzN5O59Zi4T75M5jUc83MhtKNms6b3cboSxOPWVXAcfQiBEwXLdPHWYrmtpsvbaHOcjbK9ThSuJps8NXo81P-v0xzjB5b5gWkGJUStfLu5_Zi7V4bhHnUGuBuAlzpAABohAx56UKZiA08-hf-gBB-WtCjg%3D) Friend, Radical Democrats and the mainstream media will stop at NOTHING as they attempt to convince Americans that our police officers are villains instead of the heroes they truly are.
Radical liberals are trying to take our country down a dangerous path of attacking and vilifying the brave men and women in blue who are willing to lay down their lives for their communities every time they put on their uniform.
That’s why I say that we must **DEFEND** – not defund – our police departments.
_**Where do you stand, friend?**_ [**DEFEND THE POLICE**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7d0a3c85512a4ad9b7870719d374f682&_e=8D1A6KjALyYcNcxV3eushTN0Wx8BRt5NnyM9AaAXkhXBtX594lDuMXy9e4P3Pp3uFoVjEAcC-ZL08buErO8uzuT4LK41XL9UREvqXExk7hcf-9AlYWL81drFwA999I4yqA2LMPuf-Z3rVeQ-Xx1-pgHNBzxoCOZ7zYAEsH2uWZrepfqTULsdhFzPpjTpZ5Jk_yten9RDSNTGV_N2on79bC9yjfVCUqTd2_sK8GOjNwHphQPdAP7blh0ai2TtC25t8_QeYhdlr3duNtUawpMAilGTv_PD1pEYSEINTyx0Ah1h3ZNNEphqZTzetncHjMVpiZQSFD6fVnDBkGt0RdZ3h_ZkFHm4-w4-6o000eBTrWhOd8OES4zCAjZQBXUHUJsxhzypGEkEfag7mlYSeQ9t0l6Cg8ucM4Qf7do9HFMIPL7HbPzypB4Z7VF08TqYmRsmI22Mg8o9ClnYPPYrbBiHU8YKl4GjKaUfGOF2FCQ3Zrrx_K27iDixdusUik0RZEeWttHsUnoXBJkujUumjYHqEEyobbs1h8phDZ1zTSsHmHQ%3D) [**DEFUND THE POLICE**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7d0a3c85512a4ad9b7870719d374f682&_e=8D1A6KjALyYcNcxV3eushTN0Wx8BRt5NnyM9AaAXkhXBtX594lDuMXy9e4P3Pp3uFoVjEAcC-ZL08buErO8uzuT4LK41XL9UREvqXExk7hcf-9AlYWL81drFwA999I4yqA2LMPuf-Z3rVeQ-Xx1-pjQ8iTuaCCChwrH585SYu_jWhTODb6lQ1O_auS5LyQChCLjnM4y4WEQvSExOgwyxtlR3fXcBd9HYHG5ZpVC18OcXBIlcI4wT2Beyf13svU5RFclXoYioJbtiB0T6UC3y0OusgqCGIae71GotyVTgsCGMmyxVelL-_i70KEYDNJqwvC439-H9xrNHrNxyasoK6Pl-VYR-H00FQZ-MxRy1YsPYdHqVn0g9JV628bva_N16AdOPthI8QaSoIXFKFT0Ql0OmyDlLa6g_s7CF_DCl-W8G7VbZI7J2nPvEktSmcpj20NjuFFHdY3EpsYiTc5cm_tf6u7v72i8YuxSg134bKp5SGjirZ2z34vtM2tsrksvR0OcW5fnHirAIod7whrZl2feZDJN0wREC3tQFK9L4xhw%3D) Large cities like Seattle and New York are already discussing major funding cuts to their police departments, and it could happen in our Upstate cities – From Binghamton to Utica – if we don’t take a stand today.
**It’s impossible to overstate just how pivotal this moment is for the future of our nation. **
The decisions that our local, state, and federal governments make today in response to the unrest we’ve seen in recent weeks have the potential to affect our country for generations to come.
**Our communities are starving for both police accountability and public safety – but defunding our police departments will only make it more difficult to achieve those goals.** [**STAND WITH ME: DEFEND THE POLICE**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7d0a3c85512a4ad9b7870719d374f682&_e=8D1A6KjALyYcNcxV3eushTN0Wx8BRt5NnyM9AaAXkhXBtX594lDuMXy9e4P3Pp3uFoVjEAcC-ZL08buErO8uzuT4LK41XL9UREvqXExk7hcf-9AlYWL81drFwA999I4yqA2LMPuf-Z3rVeQ-Xx1-pgHNBzxoCOZ7zYAEsH2uWZrepfqTULsdhFzPpjTpZ5Jk_yten9RDSNTGV_N2on79bC9yjfVCUqTd2_sK8GOjNwHphQPdAP7blh0ai2TtC25t8_QeYhdlr3duNtUawpMAilGTv_PD1pEYSEINTyx0Ah1h3ZNNEphqZTzetncHjMVpiZQSFD6fVnDBkGt0RdZ3hwFu4oWdhRlRqlbENp2htwvyB4X1bpxhWAXUPrHKeiVCJKFboFm9C_VeDeHYT_HX6-bhDfIy-W2iFt2o2iZTSrSj__pJQzP4h3vpcQ8lLvPEw4YOgWb4HLIvIZhJuqj1vT_RiqhnEA9rH22uDcNcsFUnf0VqaiqVetWIhieKWZmdYcbmGDsfwUeBXUIu3A19wdQRDl3gqpq4rCNqJztiRw0%3D) Thank you for your support, Claudia Tenney |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Nancy=20Mace=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Thank you ❤️🇺🇸🇺🇸
body:
Thank you from Nancy | | | [View In Your Browser](https://us7.campaign-archive.com/?e=f1831b4ca2&u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=5c1fa23ea5) [Forward To A Friend](http://us7.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=5c1fa23ea5&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| | [](https://nancymace.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8ef1646525944f29311be74d4&id=0b08bee909&e=f1831b4ca2)
---
| Friends,

My sincerest appreciation... This week has been a complete whirlwind. After our big win on Tuesday night to back-to-back calls with SC-01 Republicans, Independents, Democrats, friends, family, colleagues, and so many more, your support has been totally overwhelming. So, I just want to say, “Thank you.”

I grew up in Goose Creek, S.C. and after dropping out of high school, I eventually got my diploma from Stratford (Go Knights!). And I’ve come a long way since my time at the Waffle House on College Park Road in Ladson (exit 203).

The American dream is alive and well. After graduating magna cum laude from The Citadel, where I was the first female to graduate from its Corps of Cadets in 1999, I am living proof that sometimes life is a series of second chances and that a little hard work can go a long way.

>From there, I went on to start and own a business, have a family and even represent House District 99 in the South Carolina State Legislature so I could GET. STUFF. DONE. and above all else, work on the issues that matter to the #Lowcountry.

With the support of a unified party, your support, and a laser-focus on the issues that matter to you, Team Mace can’t wait to get started. It’s time to restore a fiscal conservative and a TRULY INDEPENDENT voice to Congress representing South Carolina’s First District.

Please allow me to take a moment to speak with those of you who may not have voted in the primary, or who voted for another candidate, or who voted for the incumbent in the last election...

I am asking for you to give me a chance to prove myself to you. I pledge to be a good listener and I will work extremely hard to earn your trust, your confidence, your support and one day your vote. I pledge to be the compassionate leader you are looking for as your next Congresswoman, representing you in the Lowcountry.

I am ready and hope you are too. Let’s do this!

#LowcountryFirst

Sincerely,

clean_body: Thank you from Nancy | | | | | | Friends, My sincerest appreciation... This week has been a complete whirlwind. After our big win on Tuesday night to back-to-back calls with SC-01 Republicans, Independents, Democrats, friends, family, colleagues, and so many more, your support has been totally overwhelming. So, I just want to say, “Thank you.” I grew up in Goose Creek, S.C. and after dropping out of high school, I eventually got my diploma from Stratford (Go Knights!). And I’ve come a long way since my time at the Waffle House on College Park Road in Ladson (exit 203). The American dream is alive and well. After graduating magna cum laude from The Citadel, where I was the first female to graduate from its Corps of Cadets in 1999, I am living proof that sometimes life is a series of second chances and that a little hard work can go a long way. From there, I went on to start and own a business, have a family and even represent House District 99 in the South Carolina State Legislature so I could GET. STUFF. DONE. and above all else, work on the issues that matter to the #Lowcountry. With the support of a unified party, your support, and a laser-focus on the issues that matter to you, Team Mace can’t wait to get started. It’s time to restore a fiscal conservative and a TRULY INDEPENDENT voice to Congress representing South Carolina’s First District. Please allow me to take a moment to speak with those of you who may not have voted in the primary, or who voted for another candidate, or who voted for the incumbent in the last election... I am asking for you to give me a chance to prove myself to you. I pledge to be a good listener and I will work extremely hard to earn your trust, your confidence, your support and one day your vote. I pledge to be the compassionate leader you are looking for as your next Congresswoman, representing you in the Lowcountry. I am ready and hope you are too. Let’s do this! #LowcountryFirst Sincerely, | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 ZOHO, All rights reserved. You'''re receiving this email because you signed up for updates about Zoho. name: Sandy Smith
subject: Police live matter 🚔
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hL9Q9_oSZpNxmng&b=VDYCzQ7ynN1hCZ.mIsMg1Q

Dear Peter,

I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

As you may know, I come from a military family- including my husband and my children. My family has a legacy of service to keeping the American people safe.

Let me be clear: those who seek to riot and burn, then to blame our brave police for their violence and mistakes, CANNOT be allowed to "defund the police"!

These riots were never "peaceful protests". They were grotesquely violent: over 150 killed, over 20 cops killed, hundreds of businesses and homes burned.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hL9Q9_oSZpNxmng&b=VDYCzQ7ynN1hCZ.mIsMg1Q

Three black cops and several black civilians were murdered by the rioters, meaning that it was likely never about "black lives matter" in the first place.

Of course, it was never just protesters. Antifa, foreign actors and what Bill Barr called a "witch's brew" of bad actors drove the violence, arson and murder.

The federal officials gathered with Mr. Barr said they’re tracking the violence nationwide, pointing to investigations into more than 800 arsons and 76 explosive devices at protests. They described the violent actors behind them, from Antifa to the far-right Boogaloo movement.

Mr. Barr called it a “witch’s brew,” and FBI Director Christopher A. Wray said different groups are involved in different cities.

Underpinning some of the dissension are the same foreign actors who have tried to meddle in American politics in the past, the officials said — though they didn’t name specific countries nor say exactly what they’ve seen.

Mr. Barr said they are “playing all sides to exacerbate the violence.”

“I believe we have evidence that some foreign hackers and groups associated with foreign governments are focused on this particular situation we have here and exacerbate it every way they can,” he said.

So, possibly Russians or Iranians or ISIS are stirring up a revolution on our streets from young extreme leftists who are murdering cops.

But actually, it's worse than that.

Antifa may be useful idiots to the Russians, but President Trump is not fooled. He is taking on that threat head on!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hL9Q9_oSZpNxmng&b=VDYCzQ7ynN1hCZ.mIsMg1Q

Sensing weakness in Democrat politicians like New York's DeBlasio, or Chicago's Lightfoot, these Antifa rioters have begun to list demands.... starting with defunding- or eliminating- the police.

Already Minneapolis is disbanding the police, urged on by the odious Ilhan Omar:

Democratic Rep. Ilhan Omar went beyond calls to defund the police following the death of George Floyd, instead calling for dismantling the Minneapolis Police Department because it is “rotten to the root.”

“We need to completely dismantle the Minneapolis Police Department. Because here’s the thing, there’s a cancer,” she said, continuing that amputation is needed so it doesn’t spread.

Now, anyone who was paying attention knows that these radicals have wanted to get rid of the police all along, so they wouldn't pay for the crimes they committed while rioting.

Can you imagine how things would go with no police to answer the 911 calls?

If your wife or daughter is in danger of getting raped... you call, and get a "ritual healer"?

If a dangerous drug addict breaks into your house and threatens your life, you call and get.... a "conflict negotiator"?

If you get caught up in a gang fight or a drug cartel war, who will you call? Your local Antifa rep?

These people don't care about your safety. They want to protect criminals with impunity.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hL9Q9_oSZpNxmng&b=VDYCzQ7ynN1hCZ.mIsMg1Q

We need to restore law and order NOW. I will work with President Trump to hunt down, prosecute, and imprison any member of Antifa who participated in domestic terrorism.

If you support our "President of Law and Order", as I do, I need YOUR help urgently

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hL9Q9_oSZpNxmng&b=VDYCzQ7ynN1hCZ.mIsMg1Q
to defeat my high-level radical socialist Democrat opponent and retake this swing seat!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hL9Q9_oSZpNxmng&b=VDYCzQ7ynN1hCZ.mIsMg1Q

President Trump has accomplished so much with constant pushback from these unreasonable socialists, like these governors and mayors. Imagine what he can do with a supportive Congress!

Will you help me beat anti-cop Socialist G.K. Butterfield and deprive Nancy Pelosi of a reliable vote?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hL9Q9_oSZpNxmng&b=VDYCzQ7ynN1hCZ.mIsMg1Q
I have a goal of $60,000 raised this month, before the fundraising quarter ends. I need your help!

I will NEVER vote with Nancy Pelosi and her "kneeling radicals"! She and her insane leftist agenda can pound sand!

Can you help me take this swing district back

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hL9Q9_oSZpNxmng&b=VDYCzQ7ynN1hCZ.mIsMg1Q
, with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants would be a major, crippling blow to the socialist anti-American left and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda. Please rush back your supporting contribution today. Thank you.

G.K. Butterfield is a leftist extremist, not a patriot, but to replace him I really need your help

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hL9Q9_oSZpNxmng&b=VDYCzQ7ynN1hCZ.mIsMg1Q
. I appreciate you and thank you.

For God and Country,

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hL9Q9_oSZpNxmng&b=VDYCzQ7ynN1hCZ.mIsMg1Q

Sandy Smith

Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District

Conservative

Entrepreneur & Military mom

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hL9Q9_oSZpNxmng&b=VDYCzQ7ynN1hCZ.mIsMg1Q

P.S. Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hL9Q9_oSZpNxmng&b=VDYCzQ7ynN1hCZ.mIsMg1Q
I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

name: Rep. Ayanna Pressley
subject: Why I’m supporting Mondaire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
As I’ve gotten to know Mondaire, I’ve seen, firsthand, his commitment to ensuring that those closest to the pain are closest to the power. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UZuFrLbqobxcvg_WmCG6CMlbrS6TYMErbmDebAYPfeX4jOIL4oJ1r56vO4ftNLFqIyD-WgL6CWrTJuiVFrsemSIlLCxPb2cldmwnZyuR-Cx3y7teaG98Iuc_5flOFIP7mnnaRM7wKWt2ZsjsRT71riTd8k-AucLa0WBm-uCMWNhbo3ofe-I6pEiDm7nsUrs790gQ-LmeMNeci26LMxWpVKouok5GTyzzFzsrpt2P0snb1S6irsDA1GLbbAhH6nJEPdLoWP1se93h4Fm0ZHiYAdDY--qvjbfT0-cMO5WNn1f4/32l/IVnjafwRQuyC1cAvDtDMLQ/h0/1m9M1b57JzSO2hekCcmGupSFIHmtflvF_-4LqEpQ_iw) Friend, **** **** **** As I’ve gotten to know Mondaire, I’ve seen, firsthand, his commitment to ensuring that those closest to the pain are closest to the power.
That’s why I’m so proud to support Mondaire’s run for Congress.
Lived experience matters. Mondaire was born to a single mom and grew up in Section 8 housing and on food stamps, so he knows what it is to struggle. As a gay, black man, he knows what it is to be marginalized. He’ll be a tireless advocate for the people in our communities who have been left out and left behind for too long.
I need strong progressives like Mondaire fighting alongside me in Congress. **_[Will you join me in supporting his campaign by contributing today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UZuFrLbqobxcvg_WmCG6CMosCB663d8EzWUHIXAWmNeirdk6UOniqL74_FvPIX3oGk889se0sxUadj3aBqHG_p8WDM3karDdcmVF9si4DBFpWegcufXXh9nqETi_4cW1xSI-PuKKXYqGqU1yk_2UupPfz0hCLCTTiuXe5btGSjxP53d4CqvaUP9ZMREH_Yh33ZmOMmSSMy53TJZ351GgondpW3APmVtPtBxAlvq6iBBMDXa19QWs3Y7AqubzPdbP7bPC7qhCegiTQ5bYOkvtBYKMC4QOSdrNRQX4JICUteXQ/32l/IVnjafwRQuyC1cAvDtDMLQ/h1/xcK7btsVkowt-Rii1IaDEpbnAkCKPm0ZexkTvpz4rbs)_**
[Donate >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UZuFrLbqobxcvg_WmCG6CMgxkg1EIi4LChkCyr4ZASJg20eLglwhC2zSOs_q1hD50ga6VHJWkSciuYShTghlClDerb-pG8SHZSGpAJOK7NsFmT4qOpgsTGqVRR3tqzlu4fEDMUwzo6O35_WL1XcgjtjlMGov1LK0bAbOgHkzJpdDip72mlYQo8FiDygjzy57og2U2E_O2Vul1D3MuqPlW1cKzy9n-k5rLYyHKLQczC2uXRnktZA2dAOT388En5N1z291xtq85ZtBmXxqJ9PYle-4zkrRK1YnU7YopSJzkHWA/32l/IVnjafwRQuyC1cAvDtDMLQ/h2/U6Xl0JwnNULjaLzWz6PqlTSabPfzCfnYqojbThDOCZ0)
Together, we will fight for the change this country so desperately needs: passing the Green New Deal, achieving Medicare for All, reimagining our criminal legal system, and building an economic recovery that puts people over profits.

And when our communities are grappling with the legacy of systemic racism and oppression, we need leaders like Mondaire at the forefront of the conversation, helping to chart the path forward.
Mondaire is running for an open seat in New York’s 17th Congressional District. He is the lone progressive in his race, and he relies on grassroots donors like you. **_[Will you chip in to help him get out the vote?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zY5UUulMfqefvlidzUvD0UZuFrLbqobxcvg_WmCG6CMiJ1ziHmfeJVfGnnsyu9rlsK4ElO6UMt-4vPK_Naxmf7-3JP_qd5RRhv2Yr2LVcrDFMS_N3P87iaNp556T9SCa_ZJBgQjP-VCFCN_ywzXvs4VXiDS_2obbOw3dop0EM20M49xuvIydtQGMIZVqc51yn1rJyQxhi1x3zyvONFGjuCjze9h8teuxNQVsVkxMm5ZF391PdziOsmNQQvEynLaA3tBrx0zRWzMHu6dsRoLrpUj0JEY1cCt_V-bVFxjsF1Gs9F04tUPICnZAo92Kr-39E/32l/IVnjafwRQuyC1cAvDtDMLQ/h3/gZbiZs5knI9Mw8RLXmMwUwjDtitbhpAhVnHbuBQTqXI)_**
In Solidarity, Ayanna

name: Tina Smith
subject: I can explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Hello — In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate. I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this request is so important. The truth is, we are behind on our grassroots fundraising goal for the quarter. It’s a pretty terrible time for this kind of thing — especially as we gear up for the next phase of our campaign. If we miss this goal, it would mean fewer resources to invest in our voter outreach program, digital and television ads, and countless other things that are absolutely critical to building a winning operation. The good news is that we're not that far behind where we need to be. A donation of $5, $10, or whatever you're able to spare before the deadline should close the gap. So, here's the part where I ask for your help: **Will you add a contribution of whatever you can afford to our campaign for United States Senate in Minnesota before the mid-month deadline? I need your support to keep our team on track and focused on all the critical work we have ahead of us. clean_body: | Hello — In just a moment, I'm going to ask you to contribute to my campaign for U.S. Senate. I hope you'll give me a moment to explain why this request is so important. The truth is, we are behind on our grassroots fundraising goal for the quarter. It’s a pretty terrible time for this kind of thing — especially as we gear up for the next phase of our campaign. If we miss this goal, it would mean fewer resources to invest in our voter outreach program, digital and television ads, and countless other things that are absolutely critical to building a winning operation. The good news is that we're not that far behind where we need to be. A donation of $5, $10, or whatever you're able to spare before the deadline should close the gap. So, here's the part where I ask for your help: Will you add a contribution of whatever you can afford to our campaign for United States Senate in Minnesota before the mid-month deadline? I need your support to keep our team on track and focused on all the critical work we have ahead of us. Donate now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Your support makes an incredible difference for our campaign. I'm very fortunate to have supporters like you I can count on, and I'm so grateful you are part of the team. Thanks. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d423/53d9897e/54be17e9/1c887f95/4016103668/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

We hope folks are staying safe and healthy. Team Warner is committed to sending weekly updates to keep folks around the Commonwealth up to date with what Mark Warner is working on in the Senate to support every Virginian through this challenging time.

**Here 's just some of what Sen. Mark Warner is working on this week:**
* [Mark Warner became an original co-sponsor of the _Justice in Policing Act of 2020_](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d423/53d9897e/54be17e9/1c887f94/4016103668/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wdbj7.com/content/news/Warner-Kaine-join-forces-with--571111071.html"), led by Sens. Kamala Harris and Cory Booker. This bill provides common-sense changes to hold police officers who break the law accountable, address unchecked bias, change the culture of law enforcement, and lay the groundwork for trust between law enforcement and our communities. While there is no singular policy solution to correct years of overpolicing and systemic racism, Mark believes this bill is an important first step.

* This week, Mark and his Senate colleagues released a study showing that their _Restore Our Parks Act_ could support [100,000 jobs across the country -- 10,000 in Virginia alone](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d423/53d9897e/54be17e9/1c887f93/4016103668/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wavy.com/news/politics/virginia-politics/senators-announce-national-parks-study-will-support-more-than-100000-jobs-over-the-next-five-years/") -- while providing the resources to address maintenance backlog in our national parks. This bill is part of the _Great American Outdoors Act_ , which also includes full funding for the Land and Water Conservation Fund (LWCF), and has broad bi-partisan support. The Senate is expected to vote on the _Great American Outdoors Act_ next week.

* Mark laid out his [ideas to make our health care system work for everyone](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d423/53d9897e/54be17e9/1c887f92/4016103668/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.pilotonline.com/opinion/columns/vp-ed-column-warner-0612-20200612-kbbqazzxvnhavlkclltbxzys54-story.html"), including expanding and strengthening Medicaid and helping workers who were laid off or furloughed during the pandemic regain access to health care, in an op-ed for the _Virginian-Pilot_.

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner

P.S. You might have noticed that we have a new look. We rolled out [a new campaign website](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d423/53d9897e/54be17e9/1c887f91/4016103668/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com/") this week, complete with a [campaign store](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d423/53d9897e/54be17e9/1c887f90/4016103668/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://store.markwarnerva.com/"). We'd love it if you checked it out!
|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d423/53d9897e/54be17e9/1c887f9f/4016103668/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d423/53d9897e/54be17e9/1c887f9e/4016103668/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
---

name: Molly Keenan
subject: FW: I won't back down from Donald Trump
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Did you see Jay's note?
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/1?t=3&akid=8063%2E868730%2EtivuOs) Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw Jay's note from Thursday -- because these attacks from Donald Trump are just a preview of what's to come. With just four Democratic governorships to defend this year, Republicans across the country are laser focused on defeating Jay this November. Don't believe me? Just look at that hateful tweet from President Trump. And they have the money to do real damage: The Republican Governors Association raised more than $53 million in 2019 just to prepare for fights like these. We have to be prepared for what's coming. **[That's why I hope you'll invest in steady, thoughtful, and moral leadership like Jay's with a donation of $5 or more right now -- grassroots donations like yours make all the difference.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8714?t=4&akid=8063%2E868730%2EtivuOs)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8715?t=5&akid=8063%2E868730%2EtivuOs)

---

---

---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8714?t=10&akid=8063%2E868730%2EtivuOs)
---
Thanks,
Molly Keenan
Campaign Manager
Inslee for Washington
\--- ORIGINAL MESSAGE --
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Thursday, June 12, 2020
Subject: I won't back down from Donald Trump
Friend,
Our nation is facing unprecedented crises -- and Donald Trump is failing us at each and every turn.
I'm focused on addressing the real challenges facing my state -- just like so many of my fellow governors. Which is why I was so disappointed, yet again, to learn President Trump took time out of his "busy schedule" focused on "keeping America great" to attack me on Twitter and to threaten Washington state:
[](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8714?t=11&akid=8063%2E868730%2EtivuOs)
Our country needs moral, steady leadership. Not a president who would rather tweet than do his job. Here in Washington state, we are doing all we can to fight for our citizens, for our health and safety, and for justice -- it's the right thing to do. There is nothing productive coming from this White House -- just taunts and misspelled tweets. This is why our leadership matters so much: because we're making up for the serious lack of leadership at the top.
**Look, I have not reached out to you in nearly six months about fundraising, despite our November election fast approaching.** But this tweet from Donald Trump proves what we're up against: attacks on our state's independence, our leadership and on the very common decency we all expect from each other.
I'm not backing down. I won't -- ever. But together, we have to push back against these hateful attacks from Donald Trump. That's why I need you to stand by me.
**Donald Trump won't stop tweeting nor will he stop his hateful agenda. And his Republican allies in and out of state will fall in line to attack me and all the progress we've made together. This is what we're up against, and I need your help:[Donate $5 or more to support me in my fight against Trump's hateful agenda and for Washington state values right now.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8714?t=12&akid=8063%2E868730%2EtivuOs)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8715?t=13&akid=8063%2E868730%2EtivuOs)
---

Very truly yours,
Jay

name: Taylor, MJ Hegar Finance Team
subject: Our most important goal yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
One month from tomorrow we'll get to see MJ take the fight to Sen. Cornyn.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901c3/7f51f7bc/4e8972b2/4ef6e593/3351661601/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901c3/7f51f7bc/4e8972b2/4ef6e592/3351661601/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?refcode=email_20200613.1nd__1543__&amount=10")
---
Hey Peter -- We're officially one month out from the runoff tomorrow, and this is our most important goal to date. We HAVE to meet it if we're going to carry our momentum through the runoff and into the general election.

**We break our goals down into day-by-day and town-by-town targets, and right now, we 're behind on donations from your community \-- so I'm coming to you for help.**

We know MJ is the candidate who can take on and beat Sen. Cornyn, but she can't do it without you. We've got to hit this one-month-out goal to give MJ the momentum she needs to win the nomination and **fight back against Sen. Cornyn 's big-money attacks right from the get-go,** and as Texas Finance Director, it's my job to make sure we're on track.

**We need 23 donations from your community before midnight tonight. Will you help us get back on pace so we can make sure MJ wins in November?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901c3/7f51f7bc/4e8972b2/4ef6e596/3351661601/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NDMifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200613.1nd__1543__&amount=50")**

Taylor Klos
Texas Finance Director
MJ for Texas

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

name: Darin LaHood
subject: This is a must-win race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
Rodney Davis is running a critical race to protect our healthcare system and to keep taxes low for working families in Illinois. [ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=957b5f43fcf84c62bafa93a47fc150f2&_e=iolQbrgQ6DbUWBnHk6d1ys_6KrBrA442oSW6lYeKaBgQTfwDNcYE_a_1FoaEiKSdEY5JRrzUcpHT6fcKusuxl6N2Lyf2_T_93FjfY_4uyUuueYdKXJtPquoNLDI12uU-b_Sabt8osKymzzgudxx-gRlsgKr3vlQEL8iyU9-vHAVJyxdDFyIOKTwSsItdEByDdJpa2vu7Y-MOkzBlP75jaTzCvpXK0kjVTX7NvxMDKA7dkf667FyLhjcwXnkI4hEUqZPJ5cU10sEqgCXN9dHjSqhT3-AzIsEekuaPiycpzMQbxKR8lyMzSrdRNETvjFL-hOFZhe-h9lfgxNgRTv5KTlLinmindwWgdySSYlvTR2R3ZxwiZLaPUrIIxH_yX7tu71wVMaoTvg_xYbMsVkLGqqSTfCdYAxGZceSxSRLUrmhDU6SU0q-Gk8E0TrIWjLxxJuaa0DDMT9aky_zRWxxOHkBpbqOJYzSn7NX95_XG3zo%3D) | |
---
Friend,

Our neighbors down the road in the 13th District could decide the fate of Congress this year.

Republicans must flip at least 20 seats this year to liberate the House from Democratic control – all while defending the seats that we currently hold.
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=957b5f43fcf84c62bafa93a47fc150f2&_e=iolQbrgQ6DbUWBnHk6d1ys_6KrBrA442oSW6lYeKaBgQTfwDNcYE_a_1FoaEiKSdEY5JRrzUcpHT6fcKusuxl6N2Lyf2_T_93FjfY_4uyUuueYdKXJtPquoNLDI12uU-b_Sabt8osKymzzgudxx-gRlsgKr3vlQEL8iyU9-vHAVJyxdDFyIOKTwSsItdEByDdJpa2vu7Y-MOkzBlP75jaTzCvpXK0kjVTX7NvxMDKA7dkf667FyLhjcwXnkI4hEUqZPJ5cU10sEqgCXN9dHjSnt4xuY5o6OvD6OB8yEyv2RGVjmVCF6HQhULjlAkfcEwnWTDox3Zd9glHyecIqYOPE62NSOWgpJsTHAz5v_vmWUUduec9j7zV9-nZSDjKa4BltrjTXt0-gBFnBhWlHLF64CQFZ8-5UU-8ipk9ulCX9iE2A2Y_7ikp_krOHbxCmTfoRs7u5hEG0YJByo8uaBD2iiKl8tTQeSE23l6x0IQwh4%3D)
**Rodney Davis** – a good friend of mine – is running a tight race to defend one of those critical seats, and he needs our support to make sure his district doesn’t fall into the wrong hands.

**His opponent, Betsy Londrigan, is laser-focused on socializing our healthcare system which will only result in a heavier tax burden on Illinois’s working families.**
[**CHIP IN TO KEEP THE 13TH DISTRICT IN THE RIGHT HANDS**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=957b5f43fcf84c62bafa93a47fc150f2&_e=iolQbrgQ6DbUWBnHk6d1ys_6KrBrA442oSW6lYeKaBgQTfwDNcYE_a_1FoaEiKSdEY5JRrzUcpHT6fcKusuxl6N2Lyf2_T_93FjfY_4uyUuueYdKXJtPquoNLDI12uU-b_Sabt8osKymzzgudxx-gRlsgKr3vlQEL8iyU9-vHAVJyxdDFyIOKTwSsItdEByDdJpa2vu7Y-MOkzBlP75jaTzCvpXK0kjVTX7NvxMDKA7dkf667FyLhjcwXnkI4hEUqZPJ5cU10sEqgCXN9dHjSoshkDYsFbdL3UgfXDHQWXDgNY5aNo17936Ionqgi13A8C--O7qG1MovRRb_8LrSs-UwZd3gE6fpGzsUpYv86KDylW4juIjDmKEUdHL1PGasOebDa90yp5e03iYo9IKkyDTxdokUNXy5x_GEyGU_A-BgH0DWUV2kqF9k77zRzC1b05dmLF4h8jJLKLzpmb4cKpbqWuDILArjFSD2FZ9hJrs%3D)
I’ve served alongside Rodney for five years now, and I’ve seen firsthand that Rodney has a rock-solid record of defending his district and making sure that the needs of his constituents are always heard in Washington.

_**Here’s what we’ve accomplished together just since the start of the coronavirus pandemic:**_
* _We secured $7.6 million to keep Springfield public transit workers paid through the COVID-19 pandemic._
* _We stood up to Illinois Democrats who want to use COVID-19 relief funds to bail out our failed state pension program._
* _We pressured Governor Pritzker to implement a regional reopening of Illinois – and won!_

**The bottom line: Rodney always comes through for his district, and I can’t think of anybody more qualified to represent our neighbors in Washington than him.**

That’s why I was thrilled when his campaign manager reached out to me asking if we could help spread the word about how important Rodney’s race is.

_**We’ve fought tooth and nail to get in position to take back the House from the Democrats, and we can’t afford to lose this race to somebody who wants to socialize our healthcare system and pass the bill to our working families and farmers.**_

**[Will you chip in and split your donation 50/50 between our campaigns to help us keep the 13th District in the right hands?](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=957b5f43fcf84c62bafa93a47fc150f2&_e=iolQbrgQ6DbUWBnHk6d1ys_6KrBrA442oSW6lYeKaBgQTfwDNcYE_a_1FoaEiKSdEY5JRrzUcpHT6fcKusuxl6N2Lyf2_T_93FjfY_4uyUuueYdKXJtPquoNLDI12uU-b_Sabt8osKymzzgudxx-gRlsgKr3vlQEL8iyU9-vHAVJyxdDFyIOKTwSsItdEByDdJpa2vu7Y-MOkzBlP75jaTzCvpXK0kjVTX7NvxMDKA7dkf667FyLhjcwXnkI4hEUqZPJ5cU10sEqgCXN9dHjSqxywze4a_fHKxx8oWy0ucerdE4273LuagmDwxirec1K81eg-8l0S4CzY4G55Lwdc1TQNo3v1piMco8QpNUtrH6ZrcKaAQA6WqaHRtoN9cP0I-Xy5g0qHdCsGSCFU6ljTUS6K3HM3xG7BNM9T3D79ppsXwZ82NIXKN-M6_1FF4HHDxobDF3zMgDBxxYqfXSGDsbHvDaQ0WaAw5J-ebdCIMk%3D)**

The stakes in this election couldn’t be any higher, and it’s going to take all of us to pitch in and make sure that only those with Illinois’ best interests in mind are making the decisions that matter for our future in Washington.
[**CHIP IN TO KEEP THE 13TH DISTRICT IN THE RIGHT HANDS**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=957b5f43fcf84c62bafa93a47fc150f2&_e=iolQbrgQ6DbUWBnHk6d1ys_6KrBrA442oSW6lYeKaBgQTfwDNcYE_a_1FoaEiKSdEY5JRrzUcpHT6fcKusuxl6N2Lyf2_T_93FjfY_4uyUuueYdKXJtPquoNLDI12uU-b_Sabt8osKymzzgudxx-gRlsgKr3vlQEL8iyU9-vHAVJyxdDFyIOKTwSsItdEByDdJpa2vu7Y-MOkzBlP75jaTzCvpXK0kjVTX7NvxMDKA7dkf667FyLhjcwXnkI4hEUqZPJ5cU10sEqgCXN9dHjSv4hi1gu9P4M4tq03sxq5MbUTrGAgziMzbUbUoMGzZew_mHGHVrBzhZsy1tMyyWKsXJkm13dhB_xl_xubHZEyuk_92AbqdWHLmTdOfdttracjD3UWJx9OAQrHhOK11PqaxPW4BduUGEQJEpaCbXDelc2OoRNIoPAdmBUHH5nx-QqSSm0m6p3uXvrULPHmLTWfraxj81dxdoskk6xK3T0TY4%3D)
Thank you,
Darin LaHood

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Saturday Recap: Schools, housing, and COVID-19 testing
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap for you of the highlights from this past week:
---
| | |
---|---
|
SCHOOLS

We have set the goal of returning to full in-person schooling on August 31st. While Rhode Island has led the way in distance learning over the past few months, there is no substitute for the experience of in-person school. But school won't look exactly like it did before. We may have to plan for fewer kids on our buses, desks spread further apart, and staggered start times for different grades. To help districts with some of these additional expenses, we will be distributing $42 million in CARES Act funding to schools to support the safe return of students and teachers.

We're going to take the lessons we've learned from this virus and apply them to in-person learning. From now on, when school buildings are closed, learning will still go on. And because we had such great success putting all our schools on one calendar during distance learning, we are going to keep that approach for the next school year.
| | |
---|---
|
TESTING

For months, Rhode Island has been a national - and global - leader in testing, and that continues to be true today. We still have the highest rate of testing per capita of any state--and a higher rate than most countries. As of today, we've tested about 17% of our population. For comparison, the national average is below 7%.

As of this week, restaurant workers, child care workers, bus drivers, gym employees and personal service workers are able to schedule a free test at our National Guard testing sites. If you fall into one of these categories, you can get tested by going to [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DhjvsCV-AVNFvco5ooJrMocC-iGuRBqIlbxQdYhSATzI2UrssSHV2EgVeu0fgaWYarHJYy4T5iSRdutFYv-qN2uUs1mG1ysn4YVo364Ok9OuebidfNsI-Ymh5Y9fuhH8HDxYgsLhHMw=&c=5TAQXPk6ABgSpgvKB_LjTumcS8iVXl-ZHg7gWbPuvrBnK59hIXyXMA==&ch=OtPtUtrSlSL3o2RhxE6mFF0Dxk48T6qePMWFJoz8LslDx4Z7yL4mIA==) or calling the Department of Health at 222-8022. To be clear, this is for people without symptoms. If you have symptoms, you should call your primary care physician or community health center and get tested as soon as possible.
| | |
---|---
|
HOUSING

Earlier this week, we launched the Housing Now! campaign in partnership with the United Way and the Rhode Island Realtor's Association. We are challenging landlords to pledge to rent at least 100 units to housing-insecure Rhode Islanders by July 1. To support this initiative, we're going to give landlords a signing bonus for each unit that they make available to serve a household experiencing homelessness.

United Way is facilitating this program and will help match renters and landlords, so all landlords need to do is call 211 today.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates this week on Monday, Wednesday, and Friday at 1pm.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DhjvsCV-AVNFvco5ooJrMocC-iGuRBqIlbxQdYhSATzI2UrssSHV2HKWq8SFEo7fyuH7wwwoB8BUuwGhbGcT5VY2hhoU65fi6SONHMRUv7u3gQdJLx3NJ5MhLq0yfJz_MCsFye8tF89cU5ez2SJeG2q-OPvzk6ZNVX3EIt7oLaSIP2AZ61WVlGpvKzLqDEf-6jD9fNOTyNKKK-6PhGL7mWU4CK3b-U1lwaHTdHaUEeSI3_orjHPNSz6BmUXf3ugYtsX8glP5DQk0MV9rk02UTlqnmgyoo1gTwStMhdtodwWNEvFI63yIgg-5GLSJRayTCl5dPrRci9x090EQGhpvyWSWv-kfc3loWOMCQW3ZGm09Ar6dzZlU8qMUPcSqChTsYTKRqHMiT6aH6oI-swJCLlUGHA-G1NE-FVS8s6Es5X2HxOQARvBmhNWdtAxvMU1_&c=5TAQXPk6ABgSpgvKB_LjTumcS8iVXl-ZHg7gWbPuvrBnK59hIXyXMA==&ch=OtPtUtrSlSL3o2RhxE6mFF0Dxk48T6qePMWFJoz8LslDx4Z7yL4mIA==).
---
| | Governor's Office | 82 Smith Street, Providence, RI 02903
---

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: The New York Times just endorsed us.
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fiq1cTq1y9eMSzXmqvujwmdy8FmPwqcqH9OxijhNZWk=/dY_s5VniVedRmDjgVhfdZb9Kvmt1GATH6Bo-P5FqZTM=)

Peter,

Last night, _The New York Times_ Editorial Board endorsed my candidacy for Congress.

Even in their wildest dreams, I don't think my parents, who fled Uganda as war refugees and came to this country in search of a better life for their children, could have imagined that one day, _The New York Times_ would endorse their son for Congress, calling him "a talented challenger with ambitious plans."

After 13 years of the same old status-quo, I think ambition is just what Central Brooklyn needs. We were facing a housing affordability crisis even before COVID, our communities have been ravaged by a pandemic and police violence, and the odds are stacked against working families like never before -- _but this election, we have the chance to change that_.

I often wonder, if my parents immigrated to New York City in the year 2020, would they still be afforded the same opportunities? Would they have access to a safe, affordable place to live? Could they give their children a quality education? Live to see them become social workers, or even future Members of Congress?

The sad truth is, I'm not so sure. And that's why I'm running for Congress -- to fight for every family's right to housing, health care, equal justice, and the chance to live and thrive in their communities. **[Brooklyn deserves nothing less, and if you agree, I hope you'll stand with me in these final days of the campaign so we can deliver on the promise of a better, brighter future for all.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fiq1cTq1y9eMSzXmqvujwmdy8FmPwqcqH9OxijhNZWk=/nrEKcrUGoqUOv2JbFjym5FaaVhjgtT7szLhT9OE_Udk=)**

******[SUPPORT MY FIGHT TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fiq1cTq1y9eMSzXmqvujwmdy8FmPwqcqH9OxijhNZWk=/nrEKcrUGoqUOv2JbFjym5FaaVhjgtT7szLhT9OE_Udk=)******
Best,
Adem

******[BECOME A VOLUNTEER](https://act.myngp.com/el/Fiq1cTq1y9eMSzXmqvujwmdy8FmPwqcqH9OxijhNZWk=/w7Q60SsVgPGERjZcgHE-ivCE8iTvVImQw2XG6m7NYMc=)******

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Three more recommendations for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Let's fight alongside three outstanding Latinx women running for Congress for the first time. If we get in this fight, we can elect these three candidates, defend our Democratic House majority, and la | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525753/45c30650/1c9d1c927/66e9f0fb/1459706947/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
First of all, thank you.

A few days ago, I sent a message asking this team to support four terrific Democratic House candidates running in tough races. And Warren Democrats responded in a big way.

So today, let's keep it up -- let's fight alongside three outstanding Latinx women running for Congress for the first time: Michelle De La Isla in Kansas's Second District, Georgette Gomez (California 53rd), and Teresa Leger Fernandez (New Mexico 3rd).

If we get in this fight, we can elect these three candidates, defend our Democratic House majority, and lay the groundwork for big, structural change in 2021 and beyond to make our country work for everyone -- not just the rich and powerful.

**[If you're able to make a donation at this time, please pitch in and split a contribution between Michelle De La Isla, Georgette Gomez, Teresa Leger Fernandez, and our re-election campaign to help elect strong Democrats up and down the ballot.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525753/45c30650/1c9d1c927/66e9f0fa/1459706947/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWdnLW1kbGktdGxmIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMwN0ZfRUdSX1RBTl9FXzIwMjAwNjEzX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-gg-mdli-tlf?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS07F_EGR_TAN_E_20200613_V1S1_P")**

I'm honored to endorse these candidates because they know we can't just tinker around the edges of the problems we face -- we need bold reforms that root out corruption and put power in the hands of the people.

**Michelle De La Isla** is a fearless fighter who knows the value of standing up for working families. As mayor of Topeka, she has proven herself to be a public servant whose first priority is the people.

At a time when working families are under constant attack, the Second Congressional District of Kansas deserves a fighter like Michelle in Congress, and that is why I'm proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with her in this fight.

We need leaders with courage and conviction in Congress, which is why I'm also proud to add my voice to the broad coalition supporting **Georgette G omez.**

Georgette is committed to fighting for fundamental change that will touch the lives of people. As we meet this moment of crisis, Georgette's proven track record of fighting to expand affordable housing and take action on climate change will be indispensable in Congress.

**Teresa Leger Fernandez** has spent decades working in the diverse Native American, Latino, and rural communities of Northern New Mexico and understands what poverty, environmental degradation, and governmental neglect look like.

I'm proud to endorse Teresa because she also knows the value of opportunity and will fight for bold and courageous action to help lift working families out of poverty, protect our environment, and achieve equality.

We need these three women's voices in Congress. They'll make us proud, and they'll make real change. But first, we've got to do everything we can to help make sure they win.

Building a grassroots movement makes a real difference.

It's how a bunch of Davids were able to beat the Wall Street Goliath and make the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau a reality. It's how we were able to beat one of the big banks' favorite senators in 2012 in Massachusetts.

And it's how we're going to win in 2020: keeping the House, taking back the Senate, winning the White House, and picking up seats across the country before the beginning of a powerfully important redistricting process.

**[Please, if you can, split a contribution between Michelle De La Isla, Georgette Gomez, Teresa Leger Fernandez, and Warren Democrats to help elect these women and help Democrats win big in 2020 and beyond.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525753/45c30650/1c9d1c927/66e9f0fa/1459706947/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWdnLW1kbGktdGxmIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMwN0ZfRUdSX1RBTl9FXzIwMjAwNjEzX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-gg-mdli-tlf?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS07F_EGR_TAN_E_20200613_V1S1_P")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525753/45c30650/1c9d1c927/66e9f0fa/1459706947/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWdnLW1kbGktdGxmIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVMwN0ZfRUdSX1RBTl9FXzIwMjAwNjEzX1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-gg-mdli-tlf?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMS07F_EGR_TAN_E_20200613_V1S1_P")
---

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: We only have until midnight to take advantage of this huge opportunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
If we can take full advantage of this donor match, there will be no doubt that this is one of the strongest campaigns nationwide.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17860281/208927642/-474893113?refcode=em_fr_2020.06.13_b2_ed_nonopeners-nd&refcode2=c983376f-cead-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOTgzMzc2Zi1jZWFkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EDgCNhqBAhrNuLyxAAD2bN1SRxOdcZ0U95rju1rh0UQ=) _We know that COVID-19 has impacted so many in our community, and we have adapted our campaign to this changing environment. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to._
Friend,

When a group of grassroots donors offered to match $25,000 worth of online contributions in an effort to kick off our general election, it was about so much more than fundraising. It was about strengthening this people-powered team, and providing an incredible opportunity for us to invest in the resources we need to win this race, together. _I am beyond grateful._ **We can bring real change to South Central Pennsylvania, but it’s going to take all of us, team. During this difficult time, please only consider contributing to our campaign if you’re able to. Friend, When a group of grassroots donors offered to match $25,000 worth of online contributions in an effort to kick off our general election, it was about so much more than fundraising. It was about strengthening this people-powered team, and providing an incredible opportunity for us to invest in the resources we need to win this race, together. I am beyond grateful. We can bring real change to South Central Pennsylvania, but it’s going to take all of us, team. name: me, MJ Hegar
subject: One-month goal -- one day left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Tomorrow will decide where we stand one month from now.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cd/7f51f7bc/4e8a5c78/4ef6e5f8/3101137958/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **The runoff is coming up, Peter. We 're just one month away,** and whether or not we meet our one-month goal today will determine the momentum we've got going into the general election. Taylor tells me we're still just a little behind on donations from your community for the day, and it's very important that we get back on track as soon as possible. **[DONATE NOW TO DEFEAT SEN. CORNYN](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cd/7f51f7bc/4e8a5c78/4ef6e5ff/3101137958/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?refcode=email_20200613.2nd__1544__&amount=10")** I'm so proud of this team for meeting every goal we've set so far, **without ANY corporate PAC help!** With 34% of Texas voters undecided in the general election according to the _Dallas Morning News_ , we can beat Sen. Cornyn this November -- but it's going to be a close race, and we need all the help we can get. **[If you can, please donate before midnight to put us over the top and help flip the Senate this November.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cd/7f51f7bc/4e8a5c78/4ef6e5ff/3101137958/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?refcode=email_20200613.2nd__1544__&amount=10")** Thanks,
MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cd/7f51f7bc/4e8a5c78/4ef6e5ff/3101137958/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-onemonthout?refcode=email_20200613.2nd__1544__&amount=10")**
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cd/7f51f7bc/4e8a5c78/4ef6e5fe/3101137958/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1NDQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=1544&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648901cd/7f51f7bc/4e8a5c78/4ef6e5fd/3101137958/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas
