name: Georgia on our mind (via VPP)
subject: Will you be a citizen co-sponsor to pass vote-by-mail?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Voter Protection Project and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0431/72412298/4dcf785d/61051fd8/615721186/VEsH/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2")

| | Stacey Abrams needs your help, Peter!! **Stacey Abrams needs your help, Peter!!** The Georgia primary election showed once again that Republicans will do ANYTHING to suppress voters -- particularly voters of color. **So, Stacey Abrams is fighting back and pushing to pass the HEROES Act, which stops these tactics in their tracks by allowing people to vote-by-mail!** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0431/72412298/4dcf785d/61051fdb/615721186/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/stand-with-stacey-abrams-?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2") **We NEED 7,000 citizen co-sponsors on this important legislation to help ensure voters are ALLOWED to vote-by-mail in November.[We're counting on our grassroots supporters to step up and help Stacey get this passed, will you be one of them?](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0431/72412298/4dcf785d/61051fda/615721186/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/stand-with-stacey-abrams-?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Wersquore+counting+on+our+grassroots+sup&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2")** [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0431/72412298/4dcf785d/61051fdd/615721186/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/stand-with-stacey-abrams-?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2") Stacey is right! This legislation is too important to sit on the sidelines, team.**[So, take a look at your HEROES Act citizen co-sponsor status below and take action today!](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0431/72412298/4dcf785d/61051fdc/615721186/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/stand-with-stacey-abrams-?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+So+take+a+look+at+your+HEROES+Act+citize&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2")** **dpwillis67@gmail.com HEROES Act Citizen Co-Sponsor** **STATUS:** _Unsigned_ **DEADLINE:** _24 Hours_ | | [Sign on TODAY! >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0431/72412298/4dcf785d/61051fdf/615721186/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/stand-with-stacey-abrams-?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=6+-+Sign+on+TODAY+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2")
---
Peter -- we're counting on you to help us reach our 7,000 citizen co-sponsor goal so we can FINALLY pass the HEROES Act and ensure universal vote-by-mail in the November election.
Thanks for taking this step!
\-- the Voter Protection Project

| [Voter Protection Project](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d0431/72412298/4dcf785d/61051fde/615721186/VEsB/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/protectvotingorg?refcode=protectvotingorg_headerlogo&amount=25.00&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=7+-+Voter+Protection+Project&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_200613_StaceyVBM_U2_X2")
